command: export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="reviewer" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="TTSNATIVE" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="gvleuv" && export AGENT_CYCLE="2" && source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh && agent_log_init && echo "logged"
git stash push -m "rebase-temp-reviewer2-log" .gitban/agents/reviewer/logs/TTSNATIVE-gvleuv-reviewer-2.jsonl 2>&1 | tail -3; git status --short | head -3
git status 2>&1 | head -20; echo "---diff unstaged---"; git diff 2>&1 | head -20

git rebase --abort 2>&1 | tail -3; echo "---state check---"; git log --oneline sprint/TTSNATIVE -1; cat VERSION; echo "---merge base---"; git merge-base origin/main sprint/TTSNATIVE 2>&1; git log -1 --oneline $(git merge-base origin/main sprint/TTSNATIVE) 2>&1

git ls-remote --tags fork 2>&1 | head -20; echo "---fork/main VERSION---"; git show fork/main:VERSION 2>&1; echo "---fork/main CHANGELOG head---"; git show fork/main:CHANGELOG.md 2>&1 | head -15; echo "---sprint vs fork/main---"; git log --oneline fork/main..sprint/TTSNATIVE | wc -l

git status 2>&1 | head -10; echo "---branch---"; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>&1; echo "---current VERSION---"; cat VERSION; echo "---fork tags 2.18+---"; git ls-remote --tags fork 2>&1 | awk '$2 ~ /v2\.(1[89]|2)/' | head -20
